message:
feat(sequence-view): enhance user experience with density mode and navigation features

- Introduced user-controlled density mode toggle for compact and standard views.
- Added jump input for direct navigation within the sequence, supporting both index and percentage inputs.
- Implemented auto-compact mode for landscape mobile orientation unless overridden by user settings.
- Updated rendering logic to accommodate new density mode without rebuilding the renderer.
- Enhanced mobile UI with a sticky badge displaying scroll progress and sequence position.
